session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of changes:
**PR #8597**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8597
### Changes Made
| File | Change | |------|--------| | `pyproject.toml` | Added `anthropic>=0.40.0` dependency | | `src/erk/core/fast_llm.py` | **New** — `fast_haiku_call()` for direct Anthropic SDK calls (~200ms vs ~5s subprocess) | | `src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py` | Replaced `generate_branch_slug` subprocess call with fast SDK + deterministic fallback | | `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py` | Pre-compute slugs in `_handle_one_shot` and `_handle_all_unblocked` via fast SDK |
### Key design decisions - **Lazy import** of `anthropic` inside `fast_haiku_call` so the module doesn't break if SDK isn't installed - **Returns `None` on any failure** (missing API key, network error, etc.) for clean fallback to `sanitize_worktree_name` - Existing `generate_branch_slug` and `generate_branch_name` kept intact for the dry-run path
